maintainer_access: maintainer can administer; required checks still apply to pushes
notes: This file documents the desired branch protection state for the main branch.
Apply it through GitHub Settings -> Branches -> Add rule, or through a ruleset matching this shape.
Required status checks must use the exact job names emitted by .github/workflows/*.yml.
Job names: validate.yml -> 'Validate (ubuntu)'; security-static.yml -> 'Static security checks'; cross-platform.yml -> 'Smoke (<os>)'.
CodeQL (codeql.yml) runs on push/PR and weekly; add its job name to required_status_checks once the workflow is active.
